SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF DEC-02-2010 IS CONTINUED TO JAN-03-2011 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT PAID JUDGMENT TO THE COURT ON DECEMBER 1, 2010. IF PAYMENT IS RECEIVED BY THE PLAINTIFF, NO APPEARANCES ARE NECESSARY AND OEX WILL BE DISCHARGED, AND PLAINTIFF WILL FILE A SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT WITH THE COURT. IF PAYMENT IS NOT RECEIVED, ALL PARTIES MUST APPEAR, DEFENDANT APPEARING WITH FINANCIAL RECORDS AND COMPLETED SC-133. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY, COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE.
